strategy: Myth boss (12425) with a hard rule: only the 0-pip Blindfolded Hit cards she hands out can damage her. She gives them to all non-polymorphed wizards at the end of every other round.

Never target her with your own spells. Any spell you aim at her (attack, trap, charm, even an AoE) turns you into a Statue for 99 rounds, and any normal damage that lands makes her Moon-Blessing to full health.

Because the Blindfolded Hits cost 0 pips, build a support-heavy deck — blades, shields, and heals with room to spare. Frenzy, Blade Storm, Dark Pact, and Balance/Spirit/Elemental Blade are the core buffs.
Buff only yourself: self-blades land on you, not her, so they are safe. Stack self-blades, then unload the Blindfolded Hits the round she provides them.
Boost the Blindfolded Hits with universal (all-school) damage gear, since it lifts every card variant equally.

If you get statued, your deck becomes 77 Pass cards plus one Break Free (50% accuracy). Discard Passes to dig for it, or have a teammate's Shadow-Enhanced spell free you — you can still be healed while a statue.

Watch your pet: passives with pierce or enfeeble can count as targeting her and statue you. A dedicated healer alongside the damage dealers keeps a mixed-level team steady since the fight scales to the lowest player.
cheatNotes: Cast ANY spell targeting her (attack, trap, charm, even an AoE) and you are polymorphed into a Statue for 99 rounds. Only ever hit her with the Blindfolded Hits she provides.
As a statue your deck is 77 Pass cards and one Break Free. Discard Passes to dig for Break Free; you can still be healed while statued.
A Shadow-Enhanced spell removes the Statue polymorph, so a teammate can free you. Solo, rely on finding Break Free.
If she takes damage from anything other than a Blindfolded Hit, she heals to full. Never attack her with your own spells.
Every other round she hands each free wizard a Blindfolded Hit. These are the ONLY spells that damage her, so save your pips for them.
